name: aiap_creator
description: AIAP Creator — creates, evolves, discovers, deprecates, validates, and simulates AIAP programs through a 15-stage pipeline with PL28 parallel self-observation via PostExecution convergence node for universal intent coverage. INSIGHTS mechanism redesign: code-as-switch architecture (insights.aisop.json + advisor lifecycle management). NO_CROSS_WRITE attribution rule. Enforces NO_SELF_MODIFY protocol rule.

skills.name: Create
skills.description: Create a new AIAP program from scratch via the full 15-stage pipeline (Research -> Evolve -> Generate -> Modify -> QualityGate -> Validate -> Simulate -> PostSimulateGate -> Observability -> Review).

skills.name: Evolve
skills.description: Evolve an existing AIAP program to a next-gen version with new capabilities, using the full pipeline with incremental diff analysis.

skills.name: Modify
skills.description: Within-version patch, quality improvement, or bug fix on a specific module via a shorter pipeline (Research(quality) -> Modify -> Generate -> Validate -> Review).

skills.name: Validate
skills.description: Structural and quality check of an existing AIAP program using ThreeDimTest with 33+ checks (C1-C7, I1-I13, D1-D10) and MF1-MF27 multi-file audit. Includes score trajectory analysis with per-dimension root-cause annotation. Standalone read-only operation.

skills.name: Simulate
skills.description: Dry-run execution path tracing and scenario coverage analysis of an existing AIAP program (Categories A-X, including multi-mechanism interaction, async delegation race detection, CREATE mode enhancement, INSIGHTS mechanism scenarios, and Insights Lifecycle scenarios). Standalone read-only operation.

skills.name: Compare
skills.description: Side-by-side diff comparison of two AIAP program versions or two different AIAP programs, generating a structured diff report.

skills.name: Discover
skills.description: Search for existing AIAP programs by domain or keyword via workspace scan, federated registry query, and semantic matching with related recommendations.

skills.name: Deprecate
skills.description: Mark an AIAP program as deprecated or archived, performing state transition and migration guide generation.

skills.name: Export
skills.description: Export an AIAP program to SKILL.md format with field mapping and governance metadata preservation.

skills.name: Import
skills.description: Import a SKILL.md file and generate an AIAP program skeleton with governance defaults.

skills.name: Explain
skills.description: Explain AIAP concepts, protocol rules, and program structure through inline knowledge responses.

skills.name: Package
skills.description: Pack an AIAP program into a .aiap archive for distribution, or unpack and verify a .aiap archive.

skills.name: General
skills.description: Handle general queries and other requests not matching specific intents, with proactive suggestions.

limitations: File system write scope limited to workspace_dir
Cannot directly execute AIAP programs (SoulBot executor responsibility)
Not applicable to non-AISOP format projects
